what: Recursively discover all CLAUDE.md files in the project tree
why: Users need a unified view of all CLAUDE.md files across the project (root, .claude/, packages/*, etc.) separate from .claude/rules/*.md which are scoped rules

success_handling.criteria: All CLAUDE.md files discovered across the project tree

error_handling.criteria: Empty project or none created yet

decisions.rationale: Claude Code rules are defined inside .claude/rules/ folder. CLAUDE.md files are project/package instructions, a distinct concept.

decisions.reason: Ignore node_modules, .git, dist, build and similar directories
decisions.rationale: These directories contain third-party or generated code, not project CLAUDE.md files

decisions.reason: Sort by depth (shallowest first) then alphabetically
decisions.rationale: Root CLAUDE.md is most important; shallower files represent broader scope
